name: Catherine DelBove
text: Collector's Cove is the best. I drove from Charlotte regularly. Just stepping into their store is stepping into a card show every day. They have a lot of vendors that rent cases from them and you can buy from the store or vendor. Mostly everything you'd be looking for in one place.

name: Danh "Sujieun" Dang
text: Collector Cove in Salisbury, NC is absolutely awesome! They have an incredible selection of collectibles, friendly and knowledgeable staff, and a great atmosphere for fans of all ages. A must-visit spot for any collector!

name: Esther Adkins
text: Went looking for all things Pokémon and weren't disappointed! Lots of vendors, gaming space and a large game happening. Tons of collectibles in addition to the Pokémon we were after. We will definitely be back especially for Christmas shopping. Love that they have a good selection of graded cards in addition to new items.

name: Tyler C
text: One of the coolest places I've ever been. Staff were super friendly, and the amount of vendors was huge. Plus there's areas to just hang out and play games, cards, etc. The kind of place you wish was around when you were a kid.

name: Amanda Brown
text: Collectors Cove is an absolute gem in our community! We go there every Sunday, and it has become a cherished family tradition. The staff is incredibly friendly, welcoming, and great with kids — they always go above and beyond to make us feel at home.

name: Marty Tobias
text: 20,000 sq ft of amazing marketplace! Huge selection of trading cards of all varieties, plus new and retro games. Friendly staff and great vibes!
